title: Salty Crumbly Portuguese Beef Crumble
description: A crowd-pleasing Portuguese dish featuring minced beef in a flavorful crumble sauce, made with plant-based ingredients and spices.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add finely chopped onion and minced garlic to the pan. Sauté until translucent and fragrant, about 5 minutes.
Stir in tomato puree, vegetable broth, cumin powder, coriander powder, salt, and pepper. Simmer for 10-12 minutes or until thickened slightly.
Fold in beef mince and cook until browned on all sides, breaking it up with a wooden spoon into small crumbles if necessary, about 5-7 minutes.
Stir in plant-based milk and reduce heat to low. Let simmer for another 3-4 minutes until the mixture thickens further. Adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve hot with fresh parsley as a garnish.
